name: Evans Group Action Bus Coach
registry_source: Michigan LARA MiBusiness Registry (not confirmed via web search)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). Multiple FMCSA name-variant searches (Evans Group, Evans Group Bus, Evans Bus, Action Bus, Evans Group Action Bus Coach) returned no carrier matching Byron Center, MI / 49315 / 2136 Pleasant Pond Dr SW. Nearby Byron Center MI bus operators (Evans Transportation Services is a logistics firm; Rivertown Coaches is an LSV/golf-cart dealer) do not match. Likely a small intrastate operator, possibly inactive or DBA. Not located in Michigan LARA via web search.

name: Allstar Transportation LLC
registry_source: Connecticut Secretary of State / D&B / company web (CT business registry not directly queried)
notes: Match confirmed as ALL-STAR TRANSPORTATION LLC, USDOT 1264543. The fallback address (16 School St, Poquonock, CT) appears to be a misread of the company's Plymouth Terminal at 16 School St, Pequabuck CT 06781 - All-Star has 18 terminals across CT. Family-owned (Dufour family), founded 2004; ~800 employees; ~900-vehicle fleet; transports ~47,000 students/day across 35 CT towns. Strong tuck-in candidate but already a sizeable regional consolidator.

name: Southeastern Bus Co
registry_source: Mississippi Secretary of State (corp.sos.ms.gov) - portal not directly accessible via WebFetch (403)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER searches for SOUTHEASTERN BUS / SOUTHEASTERN BUS CO returned only Southeastern Business Products LLC (Colfax, NC) - not a match. Yelp lists 'Southeastern Bus Company' in Jackson, MS confirming existence but no operational/officer details available via search. Address 5483 I-55 S, Jackson MS 39272 (zip is actually Byram suburb south of Jackson). Mississippi SOS portal returned 403; manual lookup at corp.sos.ms.gov recommended.

name: Debaere Bus Co
entity_status: Active (per D&B - incorporated; not directly verified at MN SOS)
registry_source: Dun & Bradstreet / Manta business listing (Minnesota SOS not directly queried)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate-only MN school bus operator). FMCSA SAFER searches for DEBAERE / DE BAERE / DEBAERE BUS returned only unrelated individuals (Dennis J Debaere WI USDOT 3642161, Robert Debaere KS USDOT 1588524) - not a match. Debaere Bus Co founded 1975 by Ron DeBaere; D&B-reported address 15091 Wilds Parkway NW, Prior Lake MN 55372 (differs slightly from fallback 17877 Panama Ave); ~8 employees; ~$440K annual revenue. Small family operator - viable tuck-in candidate in Scott County, MN area (alongside Prior Lake School Bus Association and Busse Student Transportation).

name: Exceptionalities Inc
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State Business Entity Search (apps.ilsos.gov) - not directly accessible via WebFetch (403)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER searches for EXCEPTIONALITIES / EXCEPTIONALITIES INC / EXCEPTIONALITIES TRANSPORTATION returned no records. Listed address 1507 E 53rd St #1 PMB 283, Chicago IL 60615 is a UPS Store private mailbox in Hyde Park (not an operating facility), suggesting a small/sole-proprietor operator using a PMB for mail. Web search found a passing reference to 'Exceptionalities Transportation' as a former employer in personal records but no corporate detail. Likely a very small special-needs school transportation operator; would require direct IL SOS Business Entity Search lookup to verify status/inc_date/officers.
